detail.name: Home Loan-Package Fixed Rate
detail.description: Our Ultimate Home Loan Package bundles together your home loan, an everyday account & our low rate credit card. Establishment fee waivers on personal loans, no annual fee on a visa credit card, access to discounted general insurance under our package.

features.additionalValue: 10% discount on home and contents insurance through our insurance partner for the first year.
Home Loan Establishment fee waived whilst an Ultimate Home Loan Package is held.
Personal Loan Establishment fee waived whilst an Ultimate Home Loan Package is held.
No annual fee on Visa credit card and Visa My Rewards

features.additionalInfo: Fixed loans have the ability to make additional repayments not exceeding $10,000 per year in addition to your contracted repayments
Payments can be arranged weekly, fortnightly or monthly.
Split Loan Available. Multiple owner-occupied and residential investment home loans are available under the one package fee

constraints.additionalInfo: Available where total borrowings from the Bank are $100,000 and over.

eligibility.additionalValue: Loans are available to members of the bank who are permanent residents of Australia and currently live in Australia.

fees.name: Package Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Package Fee charged on commencement of Ultimate Home Loan Package and annually on anniversary of the commencement date.  If multiple loans are held under the Ultimate Home Loan Package member can nominate applicable loan to be charged.

eligibility.additionalInfo: When multiple loans are held under the Ultimate Home Loan Package, only 1 (one) package fee is charged to the members nominated loan.

fees.name: Lenders Mortgage Insurance
fees.additionalInfo: Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) may apply on loans if the Loan to Valuation Ratio (LVR) exceeds 80%.

fees.name: Mortgage Settlement Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable on payout of your mortgage loan to prepare the release of mortgage - waived if paid out due to sale or with own funds

fees.name: In Branch Redraw Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Redraw Fee Applies for Assisted Transactions

fees.name: Online Redraw Fee
fees.additionalInfo: $0 Redraw Fee Applies for Online Transactions

fees.name: Other Credit Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Refer to our Fees and Charges brochure for information on other fees and charged which may apply.

fees.name: Arrears Letter Fee - Second Arrears Letter
Arrears Letter Fee - Default Notice prior to Enforcement
Early Repayment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged on Fixed Loans. Payable when breaking your fixed rate period. Refer to your Credit Contract for more details.

fees.name: Rate Lock Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged when opting to lock in an approved fixed rate, for a term of up to 90 days

tiers.name: 1 Year Fixed Rate Package Loan (<80%) IO

lendingRates.additionalInfo: 1 Year Fixed Rate Package Rate (<80%) Interest Only. Comparison Rate calculated on a secured loan of $150,000 over a 25 year term based on monthly repayments. Following fixed rate expiry, the loan will revert to a variable interest rate with a 2.40% discount off the Standard Variable Rate.
